items.title: Presented MoM Framework at Online Meetup
items.content: Presented the MoM (Mixture of Models) framework in an online meetup, followed by engaging discussions with the audience on LLM routing and model selection strategies.

items.title: Teaching Assistant at Royal Holloway
items.content: Started as a Teaching Assistant for Object-Oriented Programming & Software Engineering at Royal Holloway, University of London.

items.title: Product Data Intern at [Stats Perform](https://www.statsperform.com/)
items.content: Joined Stats Perform as a Product Data Intern, working on sports analytics and data science.

items.title: ML Research Assistant at Royal Holloway
items.content: Started as an ML Research Assistant at Royal Holloway, working on transformer attention mechanisms and adversarial robustness.

items.title: Founded [Nordlys Labs](https://www.nordlyslabs.com/)
items.content: Co-founded Nordlys Labs, building intelligent LLM routing systems that select the best model for each task. Beat frontier models on SWE-bench benchmarks. Scaled to 500+ users.

items.title: Started BSc CS & AI at [Royal Holloway](https://www.royalholloway.ac.uk/)
items.content: Began my Bachelor's degree in Computer Science & Artificial Intelligence at Royal Holloway, University of London.

items.title: Nordlys Labs
items.description: Intelligent LLM routing startup that selects the best model for each task. Beat frontier models on SWE-bench benchmarks. Scaled to 500+ users.
items.longDescription:
## About

Nordlys Labs is an intelligent LLM routing startup that selects the best model for each task, reducing AI inference costs by 50-60%. We were selected by the Antler accelerator and scaled to over 500 users.

## Key Achievements

- Beat frontier models on SWE-bench benchmarks
- Reduced AI inference costs by 50-60%
- Scaled to 500+ active users
- Selected by the Antler accelerator program

items.title: KV-cache optimization
items.description: Built a transformer architecture from scratch, implementing attention mechanisms, positional encoding, and training pipelines from first principles.
items.longDescription:
## About

A deep dive into transformer architectures, building every component from scratch to develop a thorough understanding of how large language models work.

## What I Built

- Multi-head self-attention mechanism
- Positional encoding (sinusoidal and learned)
- Training pipelines with gradient accumulation
- Tokenizer integration and text generation

items.title: Readyou
items.description: Dynamic README generator that automatically creates beautiful and informative repository documentation from your codebase.
items.longDescription:
## About

Readyou is a dynamic README generator that analyzes your codebase and automatically creates beautiful, informative repository documentation.

## Features

- Automatic codebase analysis
- Beautiful markdown generation
- Support for multiple programming languages
- Customizable templates and themes

items.title: Transformer From Stones
items.description: Implementing a transformer model from first principles, building each component from the ground up to deeply understand the architecture.
items.longDescription:
## About

A from-scratch implementation of the transformer architecture, building each component from the ground up to develop deep understanding of the model.

## Implementation Details

- Layer normalization and residual connections
- Scaled dot-product attention
- Feed-forward networks with GELU activation
- Byte-pair encoding tokenization

items.title: Cyber Attack Detection
items.description: Machine learning-based threat detection system that identifies and classifies cyber attacks using network traffic analysis.
items.longDescription:
## About

A machine learning-based threat detection system that identifies and classifies cyber attacks by analyzing network traffic patterns.

## Approach

- Feature engineering on network traffic data
- Multiple ML classifiers (Random Forest, SVM, Neural Networks)
- Real-time classification pipeline
- High accuracy on benchmark datasets
